_purpose: This file tracks the live state of the strategy on an IBKR paper trading account. It is committed to the public repo for transparency. See data/portfolio.example.json for full field documentation.
_how_to_change_initial_capital: Edit `initial_capital_eur` AND `net_capital_contributed_eur` BEFORE the first run (both should be the same value). After the first rebalance has happened, modify `net_capital_contributed_eur` when adding or withdrawing capital — see README section 'Adding or withdrawing capital later'.
